query:
SELECT 
  s1.externalId AS sasboss_id,
  s1.customerExternalId,
  s1.monthlyCost AS sasboss_cost,
  s1.monthlyRevenue AS sasboss_revenue,
  s2.externalId AS real_id,
  s2.supplierName AS real_supplier,
  s2.monthlyCost AS real_cost,
  s2.monthlyRevenue AS real_revenue,
  COUNT(bi.id) AS billing_items_on_sasboss
FROM services s1
JOIN services s2 ON s2.customerExternalId = s1.customerExternalId 
  AND s2.supplierName != 'SasBoss' AND s2.serviceType = 'Internet'
LEFT JOIN billing_items bi ON bi.serviceExternalId = s1.externalId
WHERE s1.supplierName = 'SasBoss' AND s1.serviceType = 'Internet'
GROUP BY s1.externalId, s1.customerExternalId, s1.monthlyCost, s1.monthlyRevenue, s2.externalId, s2.supplierName, s2.monthlyCost, s2.monthlyRevenue
HAVING billing_items_on_sasboss > 0
LIMIT 10;

SELECT

  s1.customerExternalId,
  s1.monthlyCost AS sasboss_cost,
  s1.monthlyRevenue AS sasboss_revenue,
  s2.externalId AS real_id,
  s2.supplierName AS real_supplier,
  s2.monthlyCost AS real_cost,
  s2.monthlyRevenue AS real_revenue,
  COUNT(bi.id) AS billing_items_on_sasboss
FROM services s1
JOIN services s2 ON s2.customerExternalId = s1.customerExternalId 
  AND s2.supplierName != 'SasBoss' AND s2.serviceType = 'Internet'
LEFT JOIN billing_items bi ON bi.serviceExternalId = s1.externalId
WHERE s1.supplierName = 'SasBoss' AND s1.serviceType = 'Internet'
GROUP BY s1.externalId, s1.customerExternalId, s1.monthlyCost, s1.monthlyRevenue, s2.externalId, s2.supplierName, s2.monthlyCost, s2.monthlyRevenue
HAVING billing_items_on_sasboss > 0
LIMIT 10;
